info.title: Klabis Orienteering Club Management API
info.description:
RESTful API for managing orienteering club operations.

## Features
- Member registration and management
- HATEOAS-compliant with HAL+FORMS media type
- OAuth2 authentication and authorization
- RFC 7807 Problem Details for errors

## Authentication
Most endpoints require OAuth2 authentication. Use the 'Authorize' button to authenticate.

403.description: Forbidden - insufficient permissions (editing other member without admin permission, or accessing admin-only fields)
Forbidden - insufficient permissions (editing other member without admin permission, or accessing admin-only fields)

get.description: Retrieves detailed calendar item information by ID. Returns HATEOAS links based on whether the item is manually created or event-linked.

403.description: Forbidden - insufficient permissions (editing other member without admin permission, or accessing admin-only fields)

put.description:
Updates calendar item information. Only allowed for manual items (not event-linked).
Event-linked items are read-only and managed automatically.
Returns HATEOAS links for resource navigation.

403.description: Forbidden - insufficient permissions (editing other member without admin permission, or accessing admin-only fields)

delete.description: Deletes a manual calendar item. Only allowed for manual items (not event-linked). Event-linked items are read-only and managed automatically.

403.description: Forbidden - insufficient permissions (editing other member without admin permission, or accessing admin-only fields)

get.summary: List members with pagination and sorting
get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of registered members with summary information (firstName, lastName, registrationNumber). Supports pagination (page, size) and sorting (sort=field,direction). Default: page=0, size=10, sort=lastName,asc. Allowed sort fields: firstName, lastName, registrationNumber. Returns HATEOAS links for navigation including pagination links (first, last, next, prev).

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: The size of the page to be returned

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sorting criteria in the format: property,(asc|desc). Default sort order is ascending. Multiple sort criteria are supported.

403.description: Forbidden - insufficient permissions (editing other member without admin permission, or accessing admin-only fields)

200.description: Paginated list of members retrieved successfully

post.description: Creates a new member with personal information, contact details, and optional guardian information for minors. Automatically generates a unique registration number in format XXXYYSS (club code, birth year, sequence).

403.description: Forbidden - insufficient permissions (editing other member without admin permission, or accessing admin-only fields)

post.description: Terminates a member's membership with a specified reason. Requires MEMBERS:UPDATE authority (admin-only). Sets active status to false and records termination details including timestamp and user who performed termination.

403.description: Forbidden - user lacks MEMBERS:UPDATE authority

get.summary: List events with pagination and filtering
get.description:
Retrieves a paginated list of events.
Supports filtering by status and sorting by various fields.
Default: page=0, size=10, sort=eventDate,desc.
Allowed sort fields: id, name, eventDate, location, organizer, status.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: The size of the page to be returned

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sorting criteria in the format: property,(asc|desc). Default sort order is ascending. Multiple sort criteria are supported.

403.description: Forbidden - insufficient permissions (editing other member without admin permission, or accessing admin-only fields)

200.description: Paginated list of events retrieved successfully

post.description: Creates a new event in DRAFT status. Event coordinator ID is optional. Returns HATEOAS links for resource navigation.

403.description: Forbidden - insufficient permissions (editing other member without admin permission, or accessing admin-only fields)

post.description: Transitions event from DRAFT to ACTIVE status.

403.description: Forbidden - insufficient permissions (editing other member without admin permission, or accessing admin-only fields)
Forbidden - insufficient permissions (editing other member without admin permission, or accessing admin-only fields)

get.description:
List all registrations for an event.
SI card numbers are not included for privacy protection.

403.description: Forbidden - insufficient permissions (editing other member without admin permission, or accessing admin-only fields)

post.description: Register the authenticated member for an event with SI card number. Only allowed for ACTIVE events. Returns HATEOAS links for resource navigation.

403.description: Forbidden - insufficient permissions (editing other member without admin permission, or accessing admin-only fields)

409.description: User already registered to this event

delete.description:
Unregister the authenticated member from an event.
Only allowed before the event date.

403.description: Forbidden - insufficient permissions (editing other member without admin permission, or accessing admin-only fields)

get.summary: List calendar items with date range filtering
get.description:
Retrieves a list of calendar items filtered by date range.
If dates not provided, defaults to current month.
Maximum date range is 1 year (366 days).
Default sort: startDate,asc. Allowed fields: id, name, startDate, endDate.

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Start date for filtering (ISO DATE format, defaults to first day of current month)

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: End date for filtering (ISO DATE format, defaults to last day of current month)

400.description: Date range exceeds 366 days or invalid sort field

403.description: Forbidden - insufficient permissions (editing other member without admin permission, or accessing admin-only fields)

200.description: List of calendar items retrieved successfully

post.summary: Create a new manual calendar item
post.description: Creates a new manual calendar item (not linked to an event). Manual items can be updated and deleted. Returns HATEOAS links for resource navigation.

403.description: Forbidden - insufficient permissions (editing other member without admin permission, or accessing admin-only fields)

post.description: Requests a new token if the previous one expired

403.description: Forbidden - insufficient permissions (editing other member without admin permission, or accessing admin-only fields)

post.description: Sets the user's password and activates the account

403.description: Forbidden - insufficient permissions (editing other member without admin permission, or accessing admin-only fields)

get.description: Retrieves detailed member information by ID including personal information, contact details, and guardian information if applicable. Returns HATEOAS links for navigation.

403.description: Forbidden - insufficient permissions (editing other member without admin permission, or accessing admin-only fields)

patch.description: Updates member information with PATCH semantics (partial update). Supports dual authorization: members can edit their own information (limited fields), users with MEMBERS:UPDATE authority can edit any member (all fields). Only provided fields are updated; null/missing fields keep existing values. Member-editable fields: email, phone, address, dietaryRestrictions. Admin-only fields: firstName, lastName, dateOfBirth, gender, chipNumber, identityCard, medicalCourse, trainerLicense, drivingLicenseGroup.

403.description: Forbidden - insufficient permissions (editing other member without admin permission, or accessing admin-only fields)

get.description: Retrieves detailed event information by ID. Returns HATEOAS links based on event status.

403.description: Forbidden - insufficient permissions (editing other member without admin permission, or accessing admin-only fields)

patch.description:
Updates event information. Only allowed for DRAFT and ACTIVE events.
Returns HATEOAS links for resource navigation.

RegisterMemberRequest.description: Member registration data including personal information, contacts, and optional guardian

birthNumber.description: Birth number (rodné číslo) - only for Czech nationals, format RRMMDD/XXXX or RRMMDDXXXX

bankAccountNumber.description: Bank account number (IBAN or domestic Czech format)

TokenRequestRequest.description: Request for a new password setup token

TokenRequestResponse.description: Response for password setup token request

message.example: If your account is pending activation, you will receive an email with a new setup link.

SetPasswordRequest.description: Password setup request containing token and new credentials

token.description: The plain text token from email

password.description: The new password (minimum 12 characters with uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character)

passwordConfirmation.description: Password confirmation must match the password field

UpdateMemberRequest.description: Partial update request - only include fields to update
